reasoning: Elon Musk reached his 130-day legal limit as a Special Government Employee on May 30, 2025. Since SGE limits apply per 365-day period, he cannot be appointed as an SGE again until January 2026. An appointment before December 31, 2025, would require him to become a regular government employee and divest from his companies (Tesla, SpaceX, etc.), which is highly unlikely. Furthermore, as of the November 9, 2025 knowledge cutoff, he has not rejoined, leaving less than two months on the clock. Combined with reported friction over the budget, the probability of him rejoining before the end of the year is extremely low.
